name: Vermicelli Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the vermicelli into 1-inch pieces and cook according to package directions.
2. Mix the pickle juice, French salad dressing, mashed garlic, poppy seeds, celery seed, caraway seed, cayenne pepper, salt, diced celery, green onion, and fresh parsley in a bowl.
3. Pour the mixture over the warm vermicelli.
4. Chill until ready to serve.
5. One hour before serving, stir in the chopped green onion and fresh parsley.
